summary: V65.0 Parity Push & XP Wiring - All tests pass. 22/22 backend tests pass. 5 expanded modules (Machining, Anatomy, Pedagogy, Welding, Nutrition) now have 6 materials each with full 6-depth dive_layers. 5 new skill sources wired to correct domains. 13 hybrid titles present including 6 new ones.
